items.caption: A scene at franklin elementary school's playground, which is currently empty. the playground is equipped with a swing set and a green slide, inviting for children to play. the swing set, with its black chains and seats, stands out against the overcast sky. the playground is situated in front of a brick building, possibly the school itself. the ground is covered in gravel, providing a safe surface for play. the image also contains text that reads "an empty playground at franklin elementary school. governor <person> has ordered that schools remain closed for the rest of the school year in response to the coronavirus pandemic." this suggests that the playground is currently unused due to the pandemic-related school closures.
